positive: A minimalist, ethereal scene featuring a majestic celestial whale swimming through a nebula of glowing pastel smoke. The whale has strong, clean silhouettes and bioluminescent accents that emit soft turquoise and lavender light. The background space should be deep indigo and cosmic purple, contrasted by vibrant, abstract bursts of gold and cyan gas clouds. Composition must be centered and suitable for repeating pattern prints on apparel. Use an intricate linework style mixed with soft gradients, high contrast, and a dreamlike, scientific illustration aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, noise, blurry, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, grainy, artifact, messy background, dark edges
